behavior_summary: When the player examines the CLOTHES item, the U8P_CLOTHES::look handler displays a single short description line: "clothes ".
Immediately after showing the description the process suspends/exits, ending the U8P_CLOTHES::look interaction.
The handler performs no branching, menu presentation, external calls, or flag manipulation.
notable_control_flow: Immediate suspend/termination of the U8P_CLOTHES::look process after the bark (ensures a single-shot description display).
open_questions: Item metadata lists armour.armourClass = 1 (light armour) — is this object equippable or referenced elsewhere in gameplay? The U8P_CLOTHES::look handler does not use this property.
The scripted text contains a trailing space "clothes " — is the space intentional (concatenation with other text elsewhere) or an artifact?
Are there other handlers for this item (use/enterFastArea) in other scripts that implement functional behavior beyond description?

main_function.name: U8P_CLOTHES::look
main_function.purpose: Provide the short description shown when the player examines the CLOTHES item and then end the U8P_CLOTHES::look interaction.
entry_conditions: Player issues a U8P_CLOTHES::look/examine action on the CLOTHES item
Engine invokes the object's U8P_CLOTHES::look-type process (processType 0x0208)

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: When the player examines the CLOTHES item, the U8P_CLOTHES::look handler displays a single short description line: "clothes ".
